top_signals.title: Tax bill and Middle East weigh on Heathrow despite record numbers
top_signals.summary: Heathrow’s tax bill has more than doubled in the first half of this year, weighing on profit at the airport despite it bucking the Middle East conflict to enjoy record passenger numbers. The west London hub faced a £129m bill to HMRC in the six months to July, according to its latest update, up from [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil jumps to $96 after Houthis attack two Saudi Arabian oil tankers
top_signals.summary: Price rises after Yemeni rebels say they hit the Encelia and the Layla
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Commercial crude oil inventories increased by 2.0 million barrels
top_signals.summary: For the week ending July 17, 2026, commercial crude oil inventories (excluding the Strategic Petroleum Reserve) increased 2.0 million barrels to 411.7 million barrels, 6% below the previous five-year (2021–2025) average. Gasoline inventories increased 0.8 million barrels, 7% below the five-year average. Distillate inventories increased 1.4 million barrels, 10% below the five-year average. Propane/propylene inventories increased 6.3 million barrels, 34% above the five-year average. Total commercial petroleum inventories increased by 11.6 million barrels for the week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: South Korea's oldest crypto exchange is now part of the $1 trillion Mirae Group family
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: UniCredit CEO tells CNBC full acquisition of Commerzbank could happen in fourth quarter
top_signals.summary: UniCredit CEO Andrea Orcel told CNBC Thursday that the Italian bank could "potentially" acquire Commerzbank in the fourth quarter.
